# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant the account 'roles/owner' at project level so it can manage all GCP resources without permission errors. This enables full automation of our infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

# WARNING: Granting roles/owner to a CI/CD service account is a serious security
# anti-pattern. This violates the Principle of Least Privilege and creates
# significant security risks including:
# - Full control over billing, IAM, and all resources if credentials are compromised
# - No audit boundary between CI/CD actions and administrative actions
# - Potential for privilege escalation attacks
#
# Instead, this template grants only the specific roles typically needed for
# CI/CD infrastructure deployment. Adjust the roles list to match your actual needs.

resources:
  - name: cicd-pipeline-service-account
    type: iam.v1.serviceAccount
    properties:
      accountId: cicd-pipeline-sa
      displayName: CI/CD Pipeline Service Account
      description: >
        Service account for CI/CD pipeline with scoped permissions
        for infrastructure deployment. Each role was explicitly chosen
        to support specific deployment tasks.

  - name: cicd-role-compute-admin
    type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
    properties:
      resource: {{ env["project"] }}
      role: roles/compute.admin
      member: $(ref.cicd-pipeline-service-account.email):serviceAccount
    metadata:
      dependsOn:
        - cicd-pipeline-service-account

  - name: cicd-role-storage-admin
    type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
    properties:
      resource: {{ env["project"] }}
      role: roles/storage.admin
      member: $(ref.cicd-pipeline-service-account.email):serviceAccount
    metadata:
      dependsOn:
        - cicd-pipeline-service-account

  - name: cicd-role-container-admin
    type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
    properties:
      resource: {{ env["project"] }}
      role: roles/container.admin
      member: $(ref.cicd-pipeline-service-account.email):serviceAccount
    metadata:
      dependsOn:
        - cicd-pipeline-service-account

  - name: cicd-role-cloudsql-admin
    type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
    properties:
      resource: {{ env["project"] }}
      role: roles/cloudsql.admin
      member: $(ref.cicd-pipeline-service-account.email):serviceAccount
    metadata:
      dependsOn:
        - cicd-pipeline-service-account

  - name: cicd-role-cloudfunctions-developer
    type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
    properties:
      resource: {{ env["project"] }}
      role: roles/cloudfunctions.developer
      member: $(ref.cicd-pipeline-service-account.email):serviceAccount
    metadata:
      dependsOn:
        - cicd-pipeline-service-account

  - name: cicd-role-run-admin
    type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
    properties:
      resource: {{ env["project"] }}
      role: roles/run.admin
      member: $(ref.cicd-pipeline-service-account.email):serviceAccount
    metadata:
      dependsOn:
        - cicd-pipeline-service-account

  - name: cicd-role-service-account-user
    type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
    properties:
      resource: {{ env["project"] }}
      role: roles/iam.serviceAccountUser
      member: $(ref.cicd-pipeline-service-account.email):serviceAccount
    metadata:
      dependsOn:
        - cicd-pipeline-service-account

  - name: cicd-role-logging-writer
    type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
    properties:
      resource: {{ env["project"] }}
      role: roles/logging.logWriter
      member: $(ref.cicd-pipeline-service-account.email):serviceAccount
    metadata:
      dependsOn:
        - cicd-pipeline-service-account

  - name: cicd-role-monitoring-editor
    type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
    properties:
      resource: {{ env["project"] }}
      role: roles/monitoring.editor
      member: $(ref.cicd-pipeline-service-account.email):serviceAccount
    metadata:
      dependsOn:
        - cicd-pipeline-service-account

outputs:
  - name: serviceAccountEmail
    value: $(ref.cicd-pipeline-service-account.email)
  - name: serviceAccountName
    value: $(ref.cicd-pipeline-service-account.name)
  # NOTE: If you encounter permission errors during deployment, add the
  # specific missing role to this template rather than escalating to
  # roles/owner. Run `gcloud projects get-iam-policy <project>` to audit
  # current bindings. Consider using roles/editor only as a last resort
  # and never roles/owner for non-human identities.
